nasb.text: ‘Thus says the Lord God, “It will come about on that day, that thoughts will come into your mind and you will devise an evil plan,

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God: On that day, thoughts will come into your mind, and you will devise an evil scheme

cnv.text: “‘主耶和華這樣說：到那日你心中必起意念，圖謀惡計，

ccb.text: “‘主耶和华说，“那时你必心起歹念，筹划恶谋。
